typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varEndYear as integer (),
	varOTables as string (),
	varStartYear as integer (),
	var_batches as string (),
	var_batch_nbr as integer (),
	var_log_path as string (),
	var_fzg_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fn_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_ln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	Var_log_path as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DISTINCT        p1.row_id,        p2.master_row_id,        p1.birth_date,        p1.gender,        p1.output_string AS name_first_middle_clean        FROM   ecms.tmp_patient_name_part_1 p1 INNER JOIN ecms.tmp_patient_name_part_2 p2 ON p1.birth_date = p2.birth_date    AND p1.gender = p2.gender    /*AM 20211212: added this condition to avoid weird execution issues */    AND p2.birth_date is not null    AND p2.gender is not null    AND p1.birth_date is not null    AND p1.gender is not null LEFT OUTER JOIN [ecms].[nickname] p3 ON p1.output_string = p3.nickname    AND p1.output_string <> p2.output_string LEFT OUTER JOIN [ecms].[nickname] p4 ON p2.output_string = p4.nickname    AND p1.output_string <> p2.output_string WHERE   (p1.output_string = p2.output_string             OR p1.output_string = p4.name             OR p2.output_string = p3.name); 		      way',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcstg3
srcstg3 sink(input(
		name_first_middle_clean as string,
		master_row_id as string,
		gender as string,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		row_id as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		name_first_middle_clean,
		master_row_id,
		gender,
		birth_date,
		row_id)) ~> deststg3
